texto: So when she looked in the mirror one day, and saw the beginning of thorny protrusions on her legs, a slight greenish tinge to her skin, she sighed.It was inevitable. - The Monster In Her Bedroom, Havok Magazine, Issue 1.1
explicacao: Citação de Katherine Valdez sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “So when she looked in the mirror one day, and saw the beginning of thorny protrusions on her legs…” articula reflexao, fairy-tales, flash-fiction em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como flash-fiction e monsters.

texto: She'd fall back asleep dreaming of hurricanes whipping the palm trees around her childhood home, trying to run from the Godzilla-sized beast that rushed to devour her. But her feet were stuck in invisible cement. As she struggled to scream, she'd startle awake and feel the staccato beats of her heart thumping double-time.Only then would she remember: she brought him into this world.- The Monster In Her Bedroom, Havok Magazine, Issue 1.1
explicacao: Citação de Katherine Valdez sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “She'd fall back asleep dreaming of hurricanes whipping the palm trees around her childhood home, …” articula motivacao, fairy-tales, flash-fiction em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como flash-fiction e godzilla.

texto: When life expectancy hit 95 years of age, married people around the world shouted, "Enough!" And just like that, the institution of marriage was reinvented.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Katherine Valdez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “When life expectancy hit 95 years of age, married people around the world shouted, "Enough!" And …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, flash-fiction, marriage pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de casamento e marriage.
